title: Clarify TLS behavior of ws_upgrade_and_auth connector=None
description: ws_upgrade_and_auth takes Option<Connector>. When None, tokio_tungstenite::client_async_tls_with_config uses the platform default trust store (safe for production). A future contributor reading the signature might assume None means 'no TLS', leading to incorrect assumptions about when TLS is actually applied. The build_connector() function is clear (lines 305-316), but ws_upgrade_and_auth's doc comment (lines 318-325) should explicitly document that connector=None means 'use platform default', not 'disable TLS'. This prevents confusion when maintaining proxy vs. direct connection paths.
